## ⚠️ Pull Requests Are Not Accepted

**PreeclampsiaRisk · WVSUMC** is a closed, proprietary research prototype.

This repository does not accept external pull requests of any kind.

Please close this PR. If you have found a bug, open a **Bug Report** Issue instead.
If you have clinical or research feedback, contact the owner directly at
[gdddevelopers.dev@gmail.com](mailto:gdddevelopers.dev@gmail.com).

See [CONTRIBUTING.md](./CONTRIBUTING.md) for the full policy.
